headline: How Ramp Visa (V) AI Bill‑Pay Deal Has Changed Its Embedded Payments Investment Story
summary: In late March 2026, Ramp announced it had expanded its partnership with Visa through a renewed multi‑year issuing agreement and deeper integration of AI agents to automate corporate bill pay and real‑time spending controls across large global organizations. This move, alongside Visa’s recent work in subscription management and privacy‑preserving blockchain infrastructure, underscores how its network is becoming an embedded layer inside emerging fintech and enterprise payment workflows rather...

headline: Visa Unveils New Services to Modernize Dispute Resolution Process
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 01, 2026--Visa (NYSE: V), a global leader in digital payments, today announced six new dispute resolution tools designed to reduce the billions of dollars lost annually to inefficient, outdated dispute processes. The expanded suite of dispute resolution services is being designed to help merchants and financial institutions cut administrative costs, reduce fraud-related losses and redirect those resources toward growth, innovation and customer experience.

content.title: Visa Unveils New Services to Modernize Dispute Resolution Process
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 01, 2026--Visa (NYSE: V), a global leader in digital payments, today announced six new dispute resolution tools designed to reduce the billions of dollars lost annually to inefficient, outdated dispute processes. The expanded suite of dispute resolution services is being designed to help merchants and financial institutions cut administrative costs, reduce fraud-related losses and redirect those resources toward growth, innovation and customer experience.
